name: lizhangmai
description: Reusable agent skills maintained by lizhangmai, including Monata simulation environment setup and local conda-channel build workflows.

plugins.name: monata-sim-env
plugins.description: Set up a local Monata simulation environment with pixi, a local circuit-tool conda channel, and ngspice verification.

plugins.name: conda-build
plugins.description: Manage local self-use conda channels and rattler-build package supply-chain workflows, including the bundled circuit-toolchain recipe set.
